text.value: Do you have a medical history of treatment for hypertension?
Do you have a medical history of cancer?
Do you have a medical history of diabetes treatment?
Do you have any complaints about eye health?
Do you have a medical history of infectious diseases such as HIV/AIDS?
Do you have a medical history of MALARIA treatment within the past week?
Do you experience adverse reactions when using certain medications or foods?
Do you have a medical history of mental health treatment?
Do you have health issues or issues related to nutrition?
Do you feel like you might be pregnant or that you had a miscarriage a few days ago?
Do you have a medical history of treatment or issues related to sickle cell disease?
Do you have a medical history of tuberculosis or leprosy?
Which group does the client fall into for visits?
Have you measured height and weight to calculate the body mass index (BMI)?
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
Does the client have breathing problems?
Does the client engage in risky behaviors such as smoking, alcohol consumption, or drug use?
Lack of interest in doing anything
Having thoughts of suicide or harming others
Do you have ever experienced any of the following symptoms either currently or in the past.
Je mteja ana historia ya matibabu ya matatizo ya ugonjwa wa chinikizo la damu?
Je una historia ya ugonjwa wa saratani?
Je una historia ya matibabu ya ugonjwa wa kisukari?
Je una malalamiko yoyote kuhusu afya ya macho?
Je una historia ya matibabu ya magonjwa ya kuambukiza kama VVU/UKIMWI?
Je mteja ana historia ya matibabu ya ugonjwa wa MALARIA kwa kipindi cha wiki moja iliyopita?
Je unapata madhara anapotumia baadhi ya dawa au vyakula?
Je una historia ya matibabu ya ugonjwa wa afya ya akili?
Je una tatizo la kiafya kuhusu lishe?
Je unajihisi kuwa ni mjamzito au mimba imeharibika siku chache zilizopita?
Je una historia ya matibabu au matatizo ya seli mundu (sickle cell)?
Je una historia ya ugonjwa wa kifua kikuu au ukoma?
Je mteja anaingia katika kundi gani la kutembelewa?
Je umepima urefu na uzito kuhesabu kielezo cha masi ya mwili (BMI)
Matokeo ya kipimo cha shinikizo la damu
Matokeo ya kipimo cha joto la mwili
Je mteja ana tabia hatarishi kama vile uvutaji sigara, unywaji pombe, matumizi ya madawa ya kulevya?
Kupungua au kuongezeka hamu ya kula
Kuwa na hali ya huzuni wakati wote
Umekuwa ukifikiria kuwa mtu asiye na thamani
Kukosa hamu ya kufanya kitu chochote
Kuona au kusikia vitu visivyo vya kawaida (hallucination)
Umekuwa ukifkiria kujiua au kudhuru wengine
Je ulishawahi kuwa na dalili yoyote kati ya zifuatazo kwa sasa au kipindi kilichopita?
